title: General AI Data Annotator - French (United States)
description: We are looking for General AI Data Annotators - French (France) and English – US Based Only Remote, Part-Time, Work from Home - Job Type: Part-time employee (W2) - Location: Remote from one of the following states: CA (except SF Bay Area), CO, FL, GA, IL, IN, MA, MN, NH, NJ, NC, NY (except NY City Area), OK, OR, PA, TN, TX, WA, WI. - Schedule: 20 hours/week (approx. 4 hours per day, Monday–Friday) - Compensation: $21.50/hour - Start Date: As soon as possible Help Shape the Future of AI Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional looking for part-time, flexible, remote work? Join our team and contribute to improving the reliability of today’s AI models. What You’ll Do - Review, score, and improve AI-generated responses- - Evaluate prompts and responses across a wide range of topics - Perform QA checks on other annotators’ work and provide feedback - Correct responses and suggest improvements using natural language (Full training provided) Requirements - Native-level fluency in French (France) and proficient in English - Must be located in the USA - Undergraduate degree preferred (Associate or Bachelor’s) - Ability to work 20 hours per week. While the schedule is flexible, you’ll need to be reachable online from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM during your first 10 business days for training scheduling and setup support. - Detail-oriented, responsible, and communicative - Reliable computer (Windows 10+ or macOS Catalina or newer) and high-speed internet What We Offer -Work from home, part-time role (W2) - $21.50/hour with timely payments - Flexible schedule to maintain work-life balance - Great way to earn extra income while helping shape AI Apply now to get started! #LI-CAN17
min_qualifications:
- Native-level fluency in French (France) and proficient in English
- Must be located in the USA
- Ability to work 20 hours per week. While the schedule is flexible, you’ll need to be reachable online from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM during your first 10 business days for training scheduling and setup support.
- Detail-oriented, responsible, and communicative
- Reliable computer (Windows 10+ or macOS Catalina or newer) and high-speed internet
